attempt: Transfer TICKET62's rule: after a pre-replay separator is found, the next proof obligation is a lift-stable transition law or an explicit collision witness, not another diagnostic separator.

bounded_result.transition_gate: pre-replay margin separator must be closed under cutoff lift
bounded_result.candidate_theorem: Every Goldbach margin separator state has a closed cutoff transition law, or yields a stable exceptional residue packet.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: a cutoff lift whose positive-margin label collides inside the same character/error separator state
bounded_result.frontier_rule: A separator can support proof only if the lift/height/cutoff transition is closed in the same coordinates or every failure is promoted to a named obstruction.

obstruction: This is a methodological transfer and does not solve the target problem. It raises the acceptance bar from finite separation to transition closure.
candidate_theorem: Every Goldbach margin separator state has a closed cutoff transition law, or yields a stable exceptional residue packet.
next_experiment: Construct the problem-specific transition table or report the first collision witness.
